LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF KWOK KWONG'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER DISQUALIFYING COUNSEL LEONARD MASTROMONACO AND HIS LAW FIRM FROM REPRESENTING THE DEFENDANTS IS DENIED. COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANTS IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR THE COURT'S COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. (D302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2018 Off Calendar

Mtn For Order Disqualifying Counsel Leonard Peter Mastromanaco And The Law Firm From Representing Deft'S In This Action
Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF KWOK KWONG's Motion For Order Disqualifying Counsel Leonard Peter Mastomanaco #103859 And The Law Firm of Mastromonaco Real Property Law Group From Representing Defendants In This Action.

Plaintiff Kwok Kwong's motion for an order disqualifying counsel Leonard Mastromonaco and his law firm from representing the defendants is denied. Defendants' hearsay objections to the police reports are sustained. Because the police reports are the sole evidence supporting the motion, the motion must be denied.

Counsel for the defendants is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

CROSS DEFENDANT KWOK KWONG'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. A first amended cross-complaint was filed on January 16, 2018 which moots the demurrer to the cross-complaint.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.
